videos.headline: Dominic DeLuca houses a pick-six to extend Penn State's lead
videos.description: Dominic DeLuca picks off Zach Marker and takes it to the house to extend Penn State's lead 56-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dominic DeLuca houses a pick-six to extend Penn State's lead) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marcus Yarns rips off a 66-yard touchdown run for Delaware
videos.description: Delaware's Marcus Yarns cuts through Penn State's defense for a 66-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marcus Yarns rips off a 66-yard touchdown run for Delaware) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nicholas Singleton finds the end zone for his 3rd TD of the first half
videos.description: Penn State's Nicholas Singleton finds the end zone for his third touchdown of the first half against Delaware.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nicholas Singleton finds the end zone for his 3rd TD of the first half) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
